tools.name: 20170829.associateCertificate
tools.description: Associates an AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) Amazon Resource Name (ARN) with AWS Elemental MediaConvert.

tools.name: 20170829.cancelJob
tools.description: Permanently cancel a job. Once you have canceled a job, you can't start it again.

tools.name: 20170829.createJob
tools.description: Create a new transcoding job. For information about jobs and job settings, see the User Guide at http://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediaconvert/latest/ug/what-is.html

tools.name: 20170829.createJobTemplate
tools.description: Create a new job template. For information about job templates see the User Guide at http://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediaconvert/latest/ug/what-is.html

tools.name: 20170829.createPreset
tools.description: Create a new preset. For information about job templates see the User Guide at http://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediaconvert/latest/ug/what-is.html

tools.name: 20170829.createQueue
tools.description: Create a new transcoding queue. For information about queues, see Working With Queues in the User Guide at https://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediaconvert/latest/ug/working-with-queues.html

tools.name: 20170829.deleteJobTemplate
tools.description: Permanently delete a job template you have created.

tools.name: 20170829.deletePolicy
tools.description: Permanently delete a policy that you created.

tools.name: 20170829.deletePreset
tools.description: Permanently delete a preset you have created.

tools.name: 20170829.deleteQueue
tools.description: Permanently delete a queue you have created.

tools.name: 20170829.describeEndpoints
tools.description: Send an request with an empty body to the regional API endpoint to get your account API endpoint.

tools.name: 20170829.disassociateCertificate
tools.description: Removes an association between the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) certificate and an AWS Elemental MediaConvert resource.

tools.name: 20170829.getJob
tools.description: Retrieve the JSON for a specific completed transcoding job.

tools.name: 20170829.getJobTemplate
tools.description: Retrieve the JSON for a specific job template.

tools.name: 20170829.getPolicy
tools.description: Retrieve the JSON for your policy.

tools.name: 20170829.getPreset
tools.description: Retrieve the JSON for a specific preset.

tools.name: 20170829.getQueue
tools.description: Retrieve the JSON for a specific queue.

tools.name: 20170829.listJobs
tools.description: Retrieve a JSON array of up to twenty of your most recently created jobs. This array includes in-process, completed, and errored jobs. This will return the jobs themselves, not just a list of the jobs. To retrieve the twenty next most recent jobs, use the nextToken string returned with the array.

tools.name: 20170829.listJobTemplates
tools.description: Retrieve a JSON array of up to twenty of your job templates. This will return the templates themselves, not just a list of them. To retrieve the next twenty templates, use the nextToken string returned with the array

tools.name: 20170829.listPresets
tools.description: Retrieve a JSON array of up to twenty of your presets. This will return the presets themselves, not just a list of them. To retrieve the next twenty presets, use the nextToken string returned with the array.

tools.name: 20170829.listQueues
tools.description: Retrieve a JSON array of up to twenty of your queues. This will return the queues themselves, not just a list of them. To retrieve the next twenty queues, use the nextToken string returned with the array.

tools.name: 20170829.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Retrieve the tags for a MediaConvert resource.

tools.name: 20170829.putPolicy
tools.description: Create or change your policy. For more information about policies, see the user guide at http://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediaconvert/latest/ug/what-is.html

tools.name: 20170829.tagResource
tools.description: Add tags to a MediaConvert queue, preset, or job template. For information about tagging, see the User Guide at https://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediaconvert/latest/ug/tagging-resources.html

tools.name: 20170829.untagResource
tools.description: Remove tags from a MediaConvert queue, preset, or job template. For information about tagging, see the User Guide at https://docs.aws.amazon.com/mediaconvert/latest/ug/tagging-resources.html

tools.name: 20170829.updateJobTemplate
tools.description: Modify one of your existing job templates.

tools.name: 20170829.updatePreset
tools.description: Modify one of your existing presets.

tools.name: 20170829.updateQueue
tools.description: Modify one of your existing queues.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
